MARIA GARCIA, RN
Registered Nurse

CONTACT
Email: maria.garcia@healthcare.com
Phone: (555) 234-5678
Address: Boston, MA 02101

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Compassionate and dedicated Registered Nurse with 6+ years of experience in acute care settings.
Skilled in patient assessment, care planning, medication administration, and patient education.
Strong advocate for patient safety and quality care delivery.

SKILLS
Patient Care, Medication Administration, IV Therapy, Wound Care, Patient Assessment, 
Electronic Health Records (EHR), Epic Systems, Cerner, Vital Signs Monitoring, 
Emergency Response, Patient Education, Care Coordination, HIPAA Compliance

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Registered Nurse - ICU | City General Hospital | 2020 - Present
- Provide comprehensive nursing care to critically ill patients in 24-bed ICU
- Monitor patient vital signs and respond to emergency situations
- Administer medications and IV therapy according to physician orders
- Utilize Epic EHR system for documentation and care coordination
- Collaborate with interdisciplinary team to develop patient care plans
- Mentor new graduate nurses and nursing students

Registered Nurse - Medical-Surgical Unit | Community Medical Center | 2017 - 2020
- Cared for diverse patient population with various medical conditions
- Performed wound care, catheter insertion, and other nursing procedures
- Educated patients and families on disease management and discharge planning
- Maintained accurate documentation in Cerner EHR system
- Participated in quality improvement initiatives to enhance patient safety

EDUCATION

Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN)
State University School of Nursing | 2013 - 2017
Graduated Magna Cum Laude

LICENSES & CERTIFICATIONS
- Registered Nurse (RN) License - Massachusetts Board of Nursing
- Basic Life Support (BLS) Certification - American Heart Association
- Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACLS) - American Heart Association
- Critical Care Registered Nurse (CCRN) - AACN Certification Corporation

PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT
- Attended annual Emergency Nurses Association conference (2021, 2022)
- Completed continuing education courses in sepsis management and pain management
- Member of American Nurses Association (ANA)

ACHIEVEMENTS
- Received Employee of the Quarter award for exceptional patient care (Q2 2022)
- Led implementation of new patient safety protocol reducing medication errors by 25%
